# Documentation

This folder contains **generated documentation** produced by GitHub Copilot or contributors for the Grimoires project.

## Purpose

Detailed documentation for classes, modules, features, and the public API lives here. Keeping it in `.github/docs/` separates auto-generated and AI-assisted docs from the end-user README at the repository root.

## How to Use

- When asked to document a class, module, feature, or API, write the resulting Markdown file into this folder.
- Use clear, descriptive file names that reflect the subject (e.g., `publication-module.md`, `mystery-system.md`).
- Cross-link related documents where helpful.

## Conventions

| Field | Convention |
|---|---|
| File format | Markdown (`.md`) |
| Naming | `subject-name.md` in kebab-case |
| Content | Overview → Key classes → Configuration → Usage examples |
